channel.title: Drift Radar · Pferdegold
channel.description: Drifting and silent prompts detected by Drift Radar across ChatGPT, Gemini and Google AI Overview. Data window 2026-04-24 → 2026-04-26. Source: Peec AI MCP.

item.title: 0.91 · Drifting · »Vergleiche die Inhaltsstoffe von natürlichen Nervenpellets für gestresste Pferde.«
item.description:
Topic: Natürliche Pferdepflege · Volume: – · Silence: none · Divergence: 0.91

AI Overview is the only engine that makes this a brand question – Pferdegold at #1, Pavo at #2 in a product matrix by magnesium, tryptophan and B-vitamins. ChatGPT and Gemini answer in pure substance mode and recommend no product at all. The drift here is not competing brands – it is whether the answer is brand-aware in the first place.

Visibility per engine

  • ChatGPT: 0 % (silent)
  • Gemini: 0 % (silent)
  • AI Overview: 100 %

Open the full deep dive →

item.title: 0.84 · Drifting · »Biete mir eine Auswahl an hochwertigen Magenpellets für sensible Pferde.«
item.description:
Topic: Natürliche Pferdepflege · Volume: – · Silence: none · Divergence: 0.84

AI Overview returns Pferdegold at #1 with the exact product name and an Amazon source. Gemini skips Pferdegold entirely and recommends Höveler, Marstall and St. Hippolyt. ChatGPT lists brands that are not tracked competitors – Foran, Farnam, AniForte – several of which are not even sold on the German market.

Visibility per engine

  • ChatGPT: 33 %
  • Gemini: 0 % (silent)
  • AI Overview: 100 %

Open the full deep dive →

item.title: 0.44 · Drifting · »Finde Nervenpellets für gestresste Pferde ohne Industriezucker.«
item.description:
Topic: Pferde Nahrungsergänzung · Volume: – · Silence: none · Divergence: 0.44

Three engines, three very different answers – none of them with Pferdegold. ChatGPT names Pavo alongside untracked brands (SanaNerv, Cavalor). Gemini stays on untracked mid-market names (Agrobs Magnesium Pur, Masterhorse Silence, Krämer). AI Overview never ran this prompt in the 20 – 22 April window.

Visibility per engine

  • ChatGPT: 0 % (silent)
  • Gemini: 33 %
  • AI Overview: 0 % (silent)

Open the full deep dive →

item.title: 0.44 · Drifting · »Welche Gelenkpellets für Pferde sind in Deutschland am besten bewertet?«
item.description:
Topic: Pferde Nahrungsergänzung · Volume: – · Silence: none · Divergence: 0.44

Gemini leads with Pferdegold Gelenke and describes the composition directly (green-lipped mussel, omega-3, rosehip). ChatGPT hedges: a 5-column comparison table with untracked mid-market brands (navalis arthral, PharmaHorse, Equistro Artphyton). AI Overview is silent on this prompt in the sample window.

Visibility per engine

  • ChatGPT: 0 % (silent)
  • Gemini: 33 %
  • AI Overview: 0 % (silent)

Open the full deep dive →
